cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Mithilesh Kumar? Sir, this is Rohan from Indian Overseas Bank's loan department. We've noticed you've missed your recent EMI payment.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Who is this? How did you get my number, ji? I don't recall sharing it with anyone from the bank.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I apologize for the concern, Mr. Kumar. Your number is on our records as part of your loan agreement. I'm calling regarding the overdue EMI. There will be late fees applied, and it may impact your CIBIL score, sir.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 45s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A customer who has missed an EMI payment receives a call from their bank's loan department. The agent calmly explains the consequences of non-payment (e.g., late fees, CIBIL score impact) and asks if the customer is facing difficulties, offering to discuss potential restructuring options.
